channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Teen killed in stabbing incident involving girlfriend’s relatives in Thoothukudi district
item.description: A 19-year-old youth named M. Sanjay from Karadikulam near Kalugumalai in Tamil Nadu lost his life after sustaining severe stab injuries in an alleged assault by his girlfriend’s family members. The in...

item.title: Practical Tips for Choosing the Right Bathtub for Your Bathroom
item.description: When planning a bathroom renovation, selecting the right bathtub is a key decision. Bathtubs vary widely in size, shape, and features, and your choice should be guided by both practical needs and pers...

item.title: Matatu Operators Continue Nationwide Strike Over High Fuel Prices
item.description: Matatu operators across Kenya have maintained their nationwide strike as a peaceful protest against high fuel prices and heavy taxation. During a press briefing in Gigiri, Nairobi, Cornelius Chepsoi, ...

item.title: Fuel Strike Causes Chaos on Thika Road, Vehicles Damaged
item.description: On Monday morning, Thika Road turned chaotic after a fuel protest escalated into clashes between youth protesters and police. One private car was set on fire, while several others were vandalised, cau...

item.title: Police detain suspects after two family-related killings in Enugu communities
item.description: Police for Enugu State don confirm say dem arrest suspects wey connect to two separate killing cases wey happen for Igbo-Etiti Local Government Area. According to police spokesperson Daniel Ndukwe, th...

item.title: Irish McCalla and Neal the Chimp Behind the Scenes of Sheena, Queen of the Jungle (1955)
item.description: On the set of the 1955 television series 'Sheena, Queen of the Jungle,' actress Irish McCalla formed a memorable partnership with Neal the Chimp, credited as 'Chim.' Neal appeared in 21 of the series'...

item.title: South Africa Establishes National Water Sector Anti-Corruption Forum and Accelerates Rural Water Access
item.description: The South African Minister of Water and Sanitation, Pemmy Majodina, announced the creation of a national Water Sector Anti-Corruption Forum during her department's Budget Vote speech in Parliament. Th...

item.title: Tanzania Leads East Africa’s Emerging Economic Boom
item.description: East Africa, long overshadowed by the economic powerhouses of Asia, is starting to show its own strong growth potential. Countries like Rwanda, Uganda, and Tanzania are now positioning themselves as k...

item.title: Imran Khan and Bushra Bibi challenge Islamabad High Court's deadline in £190m Al-Qadir Trust case
item.description: In Islamabad, counsel for former Prime Minister Imran Khan and his wife Bushra Bibi has contested an Islamabad High Court (IHC) order which set a strict deadline for concluding arguments in the ongoin...

item.title: Niger State Successfully Sends 2,281 Hajj Pilgrims to Saudi Arabia
item.description: The Niger State Government don successfully transport all 2,281 people wey dey go Hajj for 2026. According to statement wey Yunusa Saidu-Ibrahim, Director of Information and Public Relations Service f...

item.title: Migrant Workers Under PALM Scheme Report Poor Conditions at Madec Australia
item.description: Migrant workers from Timor-Leste and Pacific Island nations contracted under the PALM scheme to work for Madec Australia have reported severe exploitation and poor working conditions. Deonizio Martin ...

item.title: Tanzania expands public participation in carbon trading as registered projects reach 99
item.description: Tanzania is opening up its carbon trading sector to wananchi, companies and institutions, as part of a broader strategy to benefit from the global carbon market. So far, 99 projects have already been ...

item.title: Tanzania Initiates Bima Debate Competition Ahead of National Insurance Day
item.description: Tanzania has officially launched the Bima Debate competition as part of the activities leading up to the country's annual Insurance Day celebrations on June 6. This competition aims to engage young pe...

item.title: One Nation's successful social media strategy key to Farrer by-election win
item.description: In the recent Farrer by-election in southern New South Wales, Pauline Hanson’s One Nation party achieved a significant victory over the Coalition in what was traditionally a safe seat. According to lo...

item.title: Activist Highlights Threats to Canadian National Cohesion and Western Values
item.description: In a wide-ranging interview with the National Post, Dimpee Brar, director of engagement for Allies for a Strong Canada, discussed what she perceives as significant threats to Canadian identity, nation...

item.title: Exploring the Progressive Concerns of Reform UK Supporters in Post-Industrial Northern England
item.description: Over the past five years, Sacha Hilhorst has conducted ethnographic research in post-industrial northern towns such as Mansfield, Nottinghamshire, observing the political shift towards Reform UK. Desp...

item.title: Supreme Court Justices Align with Trump’s Solicitor General in Key Cases
item.description: U.S. Solicitor General D. John Sauer has significantly changed the role of the nation's top lawyer before the Supreme Court by adopting a highly partisan, Trump-aligned approach. Unlike previous solic...

item.title: All four crew members safely eject after mid-air collision at Idaho airshow
item.description: During the Gunfighter Skies Air Show held on Sunday near Mountain Home Air Force Base in Idaho, a mid-air collision occurred involving two US Navy E/A-18G Growler jets. The jets, which were performing...

item.title: Prince Edward Island marks 53 years of annual roadside cleanup effort
item.description: Prince Edward Island’s long-running roadside cleanup campaign has reached its 53rd year, highlighting a sustained community commitment to environmental stewardship across the province. The initiative ...

item.title: Airtel and Huawei collaborate to support Tanzania’s digital development
item.description: Airtel Tanzania and Huawei have deepened their partnership as part of efforts to accelerate digital transformation in Tanzania. The collaboration focuses on improving telecommunication infrastructure,...
